summary: Kevin O'Brien demoed Comply v2 to Keith Donovan of Nimbus ahead of its April 7th general availability launch. The demo highlighted on-demand multi-framework compliance reporting (SOC 2, PCI DSS, HIPAA, ISO 27001), cross-module data integration with Protect and Detect, and auditor-ready PDF output. Keith expressed strong enthusiasm, particularly around PCI DSS reporting given Nimbus's new financial services partnership. They aligned on a timeline to get Nimbus live on v2 by April 21st, with Keith's security engineering lead Priya handling the technical onboarding.
actionItems: Keith Donovan: Have Priya (security engineering lead) email Kevin to coordinate technical onboarding details
Kevin O'Brien: Send recap email and onboarding guide to Keith this afternoon
Kevin O'Brien: Reserve Nimbus a spot in the April 7th first-wave rollout and intro onboarding specialist to Priya
Keith Donovan: Share call recording with head of security engineering regarding multi-framework reporting capabilities

keyMoments.text: Keith describes his team spending three days pulling data for their last SOC 2 audit, immediately validating the pain point Comply v2 addresses
keyMoments.speaker: Keith Donovan

keyMoments.text: Keith realizes Comply v2 renders his security engineering lead's three-month custom internal tool project unnecessary
keyMoments.speaker: Keith Donovan

keyMoments.text: Kevin proactively discloses the Detect outage from March 10-18 and explains the infrastructure fixes implemented
keyMoments.speaker: Kevin O'Brien

keyMoments.text: Keith commits to the first-wave April 7th rollout, motivated by PCI DSS reporting needs and an upcoming CFO board conversation
keyMoments.speaker: Keith Donovan
